violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Several containers in back room refrigerator not labeled or dated. - Ziplock bag with a food item was not labeled or dated in mini fridge in breakfast room.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Refrigerator on the breakfast bar used for dairy items such as milk, butter, and yogurt had an ambient temp of 46*F. Since the refrigerator is opened and closed a lot by guests during breakfast, should dial the temperature down to keep below 41*F.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Cabinet below coffee machine in need of repair. Evident water damage.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Juice machine in need of cleaning. Buildup accumulating around nozzles.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Cabinets and drawers in breakfast area in need of cleaning. Several drawers had spilled coffee grounds and other items that should be thrown away.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls in breakfast service room in need of cleaning. Splash buildup near sink.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
